name: Mersen S.A. Actions Port. EO 2
summary: Mersen S.A. (formerly Carbone Lorraine) is a global expert in electrical power and advanced materials for high-tech industries. The company designs innovative solutions to enable its clients to optimize their manufacturing performance in sectors such as energy, transportation, electronics, chemical, pharmaceutical and process industries. Mersen S.A. is headquartered in Courbevoie, France.
